title: Origins ++: No Scale
description: A simple Compatibility patch to remove the scale from Origins in Origins++ so that other mods (Eg Origins: Player Scale  or Origins Statures) can better handle this
body:
A datapack for Origins. Adds Compatability Between Origins++ and Mods such as Origins: Player Scale.

This fully removes the size from Origins such as Pixie etc so that Player Scale, Statures etc can set the player size and not be instatnly reset to the origin size.

For users of Origins: Player Scale this also add "Pixie" and "Immense" size Options and renames "Normal" to "Human"
